description: Java class implementing an EmailProvider for SendGrid API, handling email sending via HTTP requests with configuration and error handling.

classes.name: SendGridEmailProvider
classes.description: Implements email sending via SendGrid API, managing API key, email content, and HTTP request/response handling.

methods.name: SendGridEmailProvider
methods.description: Constructor initializing properties, object mapper, and HTTP client.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Sends an email using SendGrid API with provided request details, handling API key and email validation, payload creation, HTTP request, and response checking.
